name: Macaroni Cheese & Tomatoes
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook macaroni according to package directions, then drain.
2. Break up tomatoes in their juice in a 4-cup casserole dish.
3. Stir in basil, mustard, and pepper. Add macaroni and cheese; mix lightly.
4. Sprinkle with cornflake crumbs or bread crumbs. Bake at 350°F for about 30 minutes, or until crumbs are brown and mixture is bubbly.
1/2 recipe: 30 calories, 1 protein, 1 starch, 1 fruit/vegetable, 1 fat choice (24 grams carbohydrate, 11 grams protein, 10 grams fat).
Adapted from Choice Cooking, Canadian Diabetes Association. 1986 Shared and tested by Elizabeth Rodier, Jan 94.
